# ~~getTextContent()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getTextContent(content: unknown): string | undefined;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts:44](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts#L44)

Extracts the first `"text"` value from an MCP `content` array.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                       |
| --------- | --------- | --------------------------------- |
| `content` | `unknown` | The MCP response `content` array. |

## Returns

`string` | `undefined`

The first text string, or `undefined` if absent.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Response text is now
validated directly via the MCP client transport or service-level
assertions.

## Remarks

Iterates the array looking for an item whose `type` property
equals `"text"`, then returns its `text` property.  Returns
`undefined` if no text content is found or `content` is not an
array.
